thi8:1.0.196: “A nun accomplished in ethics,her sense faculties well-restrained,would realize the peaceful state,so irresistible, delicious and nutritious.”
thi8:1.0.197: “There are the Gods of the Thirty-Three, and those of Yama;also the Joyful Deities,the Gods Who Love to Create,and the Gods Who Control the Creations of Others.Set your heart on such places,where you used to live.”
thi8:1.0.198: “The Gods of the Thirty-Three, and those of Yama;also the Joyful Deities,the Gods Who Love to Create,and the Gods Who Control the Creations of Others—
thi8:1.0.199: time after time, life after life,are governed by identity.They haven’t transcended identity,those who transmigrate through birth and death.
thi8:1.0.200: All the world is on fire,all the world is alight,all the world is ablaze,all the world is rocking.
thi8:1.0.201: The Buddha taught me the Dhamma,unshakable, incomparable,not frequented by ordinary people;my mind adores that place.
thi8:1.0.202: After hearing his words,I happily did his bidding.I’ve attained the three knowledges,and fulfilled the Buddha’s instructions.
thi8:1.0.203: Relishing is destroyed in every respect,and the mass of darkness is shattered.So know this, Wicked One:you’re beaten, terminator!”
